item.xeb.brass_knuckles.desc1: §eEquip in offhand, Curios hands, or bracelet slot.
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.desc2: §eHas a 20% chance to apply Bruise every 20 seconds.
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.desc3: §b§o"I'd swear this used to hurt more!"
item.xeb.mob_energy.desc1: §eGrants Strength II, Speed II, and Madness. §7(2 Uses)
item.xeb.mob_energy.desc2: §b§o"You feel like a monster dont you think?!"
item.xeb.tinfoil_hat.desc2: §b§o"i knew it from the start, everything was connected!"
item.xeb.demon_core.desc2: §eApplies Doomed for 10 seconds in the area.
item.xeb.holy_mantle.desc3: §b§o"A blessed garment protecting the pure of heart."
item.xeb.doomfist.desc1: §eA heavy gauntlet that channels kinetic energy.
item.xeb.doomfist.desc2: §eAllows charging forward to deliver massive punches.
item.xeb.doomfist.desc3: §b§o"Our future will be forged in conflict."
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.desc2: §eCharges devastating punches and absorbs damage from enemies.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.desc3: §b§o"The future has been forged, and it wasnt by me...."
death.attack.xeb.optic_blast.left_click: %1$s was hit by %2$s's Optic Blast melee strike
death.attack.xeb.optic_blast.right_click: %1$s was incinerated by %2$s's Optic Blast laser
death.attack.xeb.optic_blast.active1: %1$s was blasted away by %2$s's Cyclone Push
death.attack.xeb.optic_blast.active2: %1$s was bio-linked and drained by %2$s's Gene Splice
death.attack.xeb.doomfist.left_click: %1$s was punched out of existence by %2$s's Doomfist
death.attack.xeb.doomfist.right_click: %1$s was rocket-punched into a wall by %2$s's Doomfist
death.attack.xeb.doomfist.active1: %1$s was upper-cutted into the sky by %2$s's Rising Uppercut
death.attack.xeb.doomfist.active2: %1$s was slammed into dust by %2$s's Seismic Slam
death.attack.xeb.doomfist.ultimate: %1$s was deleted by %2$s's Quantum Cat Barrage
death.attack.xeb.crazy_diamond.left_clic: %1$s was strike down by %2$s's Crazy Diamond melee
death.attack.xeb.crazy_diamond.active1: %1$s was finished off by %2$s's DORA! Combo
death.attack.xeb.crazy_diamond.active2: %1$s was entombed in rock by %2$s's Crazy Diamond
death.attack.xeb.golden_flower.right_cli: %1$s was shredded by %2$s's Golden Flower Dance
death.attack.xeb.beam_struggle.optic_bla: %1$s lost the struggle and was annihilated by %2$s's Optic Blast
death.attack.xeb.beam_struggle.the_tears: %1$s lost the struggle and was vaporized by %2$s's Brimstone Laser
death.attack.xeb.beam_struggle.external: %1$s lost the struggle and was obliterated by %2$s's external beam
item.xeb.moon_tear.desc2: §eForces visual and actual night for 24,000 ticks.
item.xeb.moon_tear.desc3: §b§o"A tear fallen from the blood moon..."
advancements.xeb.root.title: xEB Elite Buffs
advancements.xeb.survive_permanight.desc: Survive a complete Elite Permanight event.
advancements.xeb.elite_slayer_3.title: Giant Slayer
advancements.xeb.elite_slayer_3.descript: Defeat an elite mob with 3 or more active medallions.
advancements.xeb.evolved_champion.title: Supreme Evolution
advancements.xeb.evolved_champion.descri: Witness a mob evolving to its maximum limit of 5 medallions.
chat.xeb.permanight.start: §c§lThe night will endure until the strongest survives!
chat.xeb.permanight.end: §a§lThe Eternal Night has ended! You have survived.
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.1: §7The shadows whisper of weak, fragile elites appearing. Only bronze medallion tiers can be seen...
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.4: §eElites are growing stronger. Two medallions can now manifest, and silver tiers begin to glow...
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.7: §cThe ground shakes. Bosses are empowered by ancient medallions. Up to three buffs can merge, and legendary gold tiers emerge...
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.10: §4§lThe ultimate challenge is upon you. Elites wield up to four medallions of pure chaos, and gold tier items shine everywhere...
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc1: §eAn advanced ocular device that fires solar energy.
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc2: §eUnleashes a continuous laser beam or fast bursts at the cost of heat.
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc6: §b§o"If I could see what you see through those eyes..."
item.xeb.golden_flower.desc1: §eA mysterious flower that channels the power of nature.
item.xeb.golden_flower.desc2: §eAllows firing slow pellets and charging homing flowers.
item.xeb.golden_flower.desc3: §b§o"A jerk with a heart of gold"
item.xeb.quantum_cat_barrage.desc1: §eAccumulates recently dealt damage to release it in a devastating area attack.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.desc1: §eA broken diamond that holds the spirit of a restorative warrior.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.desc2: §eAllows summoning a Stand that strikes at double reach.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.desc3: §eCharges a rapid barrage that can heal nearby team members.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.lore: §b§o"There is nothing in this world that cannot be healed or restored..."
item.xeb.the_tears.desc1: §eA tearful artifact that fires alternating tears from your eyes.
item.xeb.the_tears.desc2: §eCharge and release a massive Brimstone laser from your mouth (1.5x1.5).
hud.xeb.beam_struggle.title: BEAM STRUGGLE
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.desc1: §eA high-tech mechanical core that channels sonic jet propulsion.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.desc2: §eSkates to build momentum and hovers in mid-air. Overcharges at max momentum.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.desc5: §ePress %s for Spin Dash Missile (3 independent charges with lock-on target tracking)
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.desc1: §eA legendary crown that manifests dual blades of light and shadow.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.desc2: §eSwings in a 3-stage combo and charges a massive Holy Blast from the sky.
modifier.xeb.mirror.description: Has chance to replicate target attack style
item.xeb.essence.absorbent.desc: Absorbs damage and converts to shielding
modifier.xeb.resonant.description: Emits shockwaves when landing critical hits
modifier.xeb.reactive.description: Explodes when hit by projectiles or magic
modifier.xeb.elite_slayer.description: +25% damage against medallion-bearing mobs, -10% against others
item.xeb.essence.mirror.desc: Has chance to replicate target attack style
item.xeb.essence.damaging.desc: Deals increased damage and ignore target armor
modifier.xeb.absorbent.description: Absorbs damage and converts to shielding

item.xeb.essence.mad.desc: Goes into rage on low health
item.xeb.essence.undying.desc: Has chance to cheat death once
modifier.xeb.damaging.description: Deals increased damage and ignore target armor

modifier.xeb.plow.description: Breaks blocks and shields when hitting
item.xeb.essence.sticky.desc: Slows and traps targets in cobwebs/slime

item.xeb.essence.plow.desc: Breaks blocks and shields when hitting
modifier.xeb.mad.description: Goes into rage on low health
modifier.xeb.infested.description: Spawns silverfish or bees when hit
modifier.xeb.spiked_conditioning.descrip: When blocking with this tool, gain 0.5 armor for 3 seconds
item.xeb.essence.bouncy.desc: Repels attackers and increases jump height
modifier.xeb.bouncy.description: Repels attackers and increases jump height

When blocking with this tool, gain 0.5 armor for 3 seconds

modifier.tconstruct.absorbent.descriptio: Absorbs damage and converts to shielding
item.xeb.enigma_bios.desc: §b§o"You'd think it comes with photos of its previous owner, but it doesn't even have a gallery!"
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.title: Enigma Bios
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.label.name: Name:
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log1.title: Log #1 - Origin of the Anomaly
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log1.content: Records of the Day of the Great Collision. The energy released by the Mewgenics medallions and divine weaponry shattered our dimension's space-time barriers. We have detected anomalies in native creatures, who now bear symbols of power.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log2.title: Log #2 - Crown and Duality
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log2.content: The divine crown that shattered the Stacy hatchery has fragmented. Its pieces forged the Holy Duality Blade. The wielder is warned: balancing light and shadow is vital. An imbalance will unleash uncontrollable Annihilation.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log3.title: Log #3 - Kinetic Power
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log3.content: Our research on the Doomfist gauntlet reveals it is no ordinary weapon. It channels impact energy to supercharge its internal circuitry. Akande Ogundimu was right: conflict drives evolution.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log4.title: Log #4 - Tears and Brimstone
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log4.content: The Tears specimen appears connected to the suffering of a child trapped in an underground labyrinth. By channeling their pain, the wielder can invoke the Brimstone beam. The risk of thermal overload is extremely high.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log5.title: Log #5 - Flower and Fusion
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log5.content: An unprecedented blooming has been recorded. The Golden Flower and Jarona's spectrum do not originate from our natural world. Those who achieve ultimate attunement can unleash the Omega Flowery state, defying gravity itself.
item.xeb.golden_flower.enigma_lore: A golden flower that appears to smile and watch. It feels like a tragic, subterranean creature, but contains natural magic and patterns reminiscent of a dark sequel chapter.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.left_clic: Shoots slow, homing golden petals towards enemies.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.right_cli: Launches charged homing flowers that target multiple foes.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.active1.d: Summons a rotating shield of sharp petals that shred nearby targets.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.active2.d: Unleashes a massive barrage of homing floral energy.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.enigma_lore: An optimized kinetic gauntlet. Its owner, Akande Ogundimu, modified its internal dampeners to withstand global wars and perpetuate conflict.
Short-range shotgun blasts from the knuckles.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.ability.right_click: Charges kinetic force to dash forward, dealing high damage and wall-slam impact.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.ability.active1.des: Leaps forward and slams the ground, pulling nearby enemies inward.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.ability.active2.des: Blocks frontal attacks to charge up and supercharge the next Rocket Punch.
item.xeb.doomfist.enigma_lore: The original kinetic fist. With it, Akande Ogundimu initiated his rise in a shadow organisation (Talon) and forced his leadership from the bottom.
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.right_click.de: Dashes forward with a powerful punch.
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active1.name: Rising Uppercut
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active1.desc: Strikes upward, launching both the user and nearby enemies into the air.
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active2.name: Seismic Slam
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active2.desc: Leaps and creates a shockwave on landing, dealing area damage.
gui.xeb.hud_customizer.title: xEB Custom Weapon HUD Configuration
gui.xeb.hud_customizer.instruction: Drag the HUD to reposition | Use +/- or Reset
item.xeb.optic_blast.enigma_lore: Visor based on a mutant leader (Cyclops) who fought alongside street warriors (Ryu) to defeat Apocalypse, reinforcing mutant-human coexistence.
Fires rapid, low-heat optic laser pulses.
item.xeb.optic_blast.ability.right_click: Fires high-speed laser pellets continuously while held.
item.xeb.optic_blast.ability.active1.des: Releases an optic blast wave that pushes enemies away.
item.xeb.optic_blast.ability.active2.des: Channels a continuous laser beam dealing massive damage.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.enigma_lore: A legendary crown representing the Creator (God) from a chaotic cattery. He caused the doom of all Stacys, leaving them scattered in the sky.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.ability.left: Quick slashes alternating light and shadow blades.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.ability.righ: A two-hit sweeping slash combo dealing high damage.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.enigma_lore: This legendary weapon features an integrated cognitive processor that analyzes wielder health and dynamically optimizes strike damage.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.ability.left_clic: A swift thrust powered by cognitive combat processors (9.0 damage).
item.xeb.smart_halberd.ability.right_cli: A wide horizontal sweep dealing heavy area damage (14.0 damage).
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.ability.acti: Summons sweeping spectral blades of pure light.
Rains down divine retribution swords from the heavens.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.enigma_lore: An overdrive core based on Mecha Sonic MKII, built by Dr. Eggman. He once harnessed the Master Emerald to challenge Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.ability.right_c: Fires rapid laser pellets from eye-level while held.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.ability.active1: Launches forward at sonic speed, dealing impact damage.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.ability.active2: Fires homing missiles in quick succession.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.enigma_lore: The spiritual Stand of Josuke. Its echo reveals a protector who repairs what is broken, showing that restoration is the ultimate force.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.ability.right_cl: Unleashes a rapid barrage of punches with high knockback using punch charges.
Leaps forward into a heavy Stand strike (8.0 damage).
Restores and heals target living entity health.
item.xeb.the_tears.enigma_lore: Based on the tears of Isaac, a boy who fled to the basement to escape his mother, who, convinced by a divine voice, tried to sacrifice him.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.left_click.de: Fires alternating tears from the eyes.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.right_click.d: Charges and fires a massive continuous Brimstone laser from the mouth.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active1.name: Playdough Cookie
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active1.desc: Applies a random elemental effect to the next tear shots.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active2.name: Camo Undies
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active2.desc: Grants temporary invisibility and removes hostile aggro.
item.xeb.moon_tear.enigma_lore: A teardrop fallen from a blood moon. It forces the Permanight visual effect, turning the sky into the gray, toxic, high-contrast apocalypse of a dying world.
item.xeb.moon_tear.enigma_effect: Darkens the sky and activates the elite Permanight event.
item.xeb.tinfoil_hat.enigma_lore: A simple foil hat. It blocks the static frequencies radiating from Steven's Great Fracture.
item.xeb.tinfoil_hat.enigma_effect: Grants absolute immunity to mental control effects and madness.
item.xeb.holy_mantle.enigma_lore: A blessed garment protecting the pure of heart from harm.
item.xeb.holy_mantle.enigma_effect: Passively blocks the next incoming instance of damage. (2-minute cooldown).
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.enigma_lore: A heavy piece of street metal for close-quarters brawls.
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.enigma_effect: Has a chance to apply the Bruise (Moretón) effect on hit.
item.xeb.demon_core.enigma_lore: A subcritical mass of plutonium. Keep the screwdriver in place.
item.xeb.demon_core.enigma_effect: Generates a deadly radiation leak that applies the Doomed status to all nearby entities.
item.xeb.mob_energy.enigma_lore: A hyper-charged energy drink loaded with raw combat essence.
item.xeb.mob_energy.enigma_effect: Grants Strength II, Speed II, and a temporary state of madness.
chat.xeb.enigma.requires_item: You must have the Enigma Bios in your inventory or equipped in the Enigma slot.
item.xeb.enigma_bios.desc: Assistance device with recognition capabilities beyond measurement.
item.xeb.enigma_bios.lore: "An ancient log containing all records, anomalies, and medallion analyses of the world."
item.xeb.dogma.desc1: A curio imbued with the power of absolute darkness.
item.xeb.dogma.desc2: While holding The Tears, press %s to activate.
item.xeb.dogma.desc3: Fires a massive Brimstone beam that grows wider over 10 seconds.
item.xeb.dogma.enigma_lore: "At the total disposal of truth and the absolute itself"
item.xeb.dogma.enigma_effect: Fires a growing Brimstone beam (9.99 dmg/tick, 10 s). Auto-wins beam struggles.
item.xeb.omega_flowery.desc1: A flower of impossible blooming, petal-thin and galaxy-wide.
item.xeb.omega_flowery.desc2: While holding Golden Flower, press %s to transform.
item.xeb.omega_flowery.desc3: Enters a 20 s zero-gravity instance. Doubles Jarona damage. Flower Dance heals 20% HP.
item.xeb.omega_flowery.enigma_lore: "I hope you are ready for this bright and dark world with a touch of JARONA!"
item.xeb.omega_flowery.enigma_effect: Enters Omega Flowery instance for 20 s: zero gravity, Final Jarona (×2), 50% faster cooldowns.
chat.xeb.extreme_burst.requires_weapon: You need to hold the required weapon to activate this Extreme Burst.
chat.xeb.extreme_burst.already_active: An Extreme Burst is already active.
chat.xeb.extreme_burst.equip_curio: Extreme Burst item must be equipped in a Curio slot to be used.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.toast.subtitle: Log #%s
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log.locked.title: Log #%s [ENCRYPTED]
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log.locked.desc: High-security encryption. Defeat enemies with elite medallions to decipher this log.
item.unknown.enigma_lore: WARNING: Unknown specimen. Enigma Bios scanners cannot identify the molecular structure of this object. It could be highly dangerous... or completely useless.
item.unknown.enigma_effect: EFFECT: INCOGNITO. Causes static electromagnetic interference on HUD sensors. Extreme caution is advised when handling.
enchantment.xeb.medallero.desc: Increases the chance of dropping logs from medallion-bearing mobs. Also acts as Looting on custom mod weapons.
item.unknown.enigma_lore.0: WARNING: Unstable molecular structure. Enigma Bios scanners detect traces of residual energy defying known laws of physics.
item.unknown.enigma_lore.1: ANALYSIS ERROR: Corrupt quantum signature. This specimen emits a strange cyclic signal. It could be a fragment of a collapsed reality.
item.unknown.enigma_lore.2: ATTENTION: Unidentified biological reading. Sensors report a passive hostile response. Handle with caution.
item.unknown.enigma_lore.3: WARNING: Unknown origin. No records of this object were found in Steven's or Mewgenics' databases. Proceed at your own risk.
item.unknown.enigma_lore.4: ALERT: Anomalous thermodynamic fluctuation. The matter of this specimen absorbs and repels light at irregular intervals.
item.unknown.enigma_effect.0: EFFECT: INCOGNITO. Generates subtle electromagnetic interference on the wielder's HUD.
item.unknown.enigma_effect.1: EFFECT: INDETERMINATE. Possible amplification of nearby temporal distortion fields.
item.unknown.enigma_effect.2: EFFECT: CHAOTIC. Emits random electrostatic discharges that block active sensors.
item.unknown.enigma_effect.3: EFFECT: CRITICAL. Generates an invisible thermal signature that deforms space around it.
item.unknown.enigma_effect.4: EFFECT: ALTERED. Briefly interrupts radio communications and interferes with map readings.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.desc1: §eA legendary high-tech halberd with exceptional reach.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.desc2: §eHold right click to charge and spawn frozen ice spikes in a zigzag pattern, releasing to launch them.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.lore: §b§o"You can feel the cold suffered by its smart owner."
item.xeb.smart_halberd.enigma_lore: ANALYSIS: This legendary weapon contains an integrated cognitive processor. It tracks wielder health and dynamically updates its display based on combat conditions.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.ability.left_clic: Deliver standard vanilla attacks. Has a Netherite-axe-like speed but boasts increased reach and 9 attack damage.
item.xeb.smart_halberd.ability.right_cli: Charge to manifest frozen ice spikes in a zigzag pattern. Releasing launches them to strike targets and shatter on impact into smaller barbs.
enchantment.xeb.floricultura.desc: Speeds up the charge regeneration rate of the Golden Flower.
enchantment.xeb.spike_frenzy.desc: Launches extra adjacent spikes when releasing a charged Smart Halberd strike.
enchantment.xeb.impact_overload.desc: Amplifies Doomfist wall-slam damage and releases a damaging kinetic shockwave.
enchantment.xeb.refraction.desc: Causes linear lasers (Optic Blast, The Tears) to split into mini-lasers upon hitting a blocked target.
gui.xeb.tooltip.extreme_burst.effects.ca: §5• Summons a rift of quantum cats that shred all surrounding enemies.
gui.xeb.tooltip.extreme_burst.effects.do: §5• Fires a colossal Dogma beam for 10 seconds and guarantees victory in all Beam Struggles.
gui.xeb.tooltip.extreme_burst.effects.fl: §5• Transforms the user into the Omega Flowery form for 20 seconds, unlocking zero-gravity flight and doubled floral damage.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log6.title: Log #06: The Thorned Resonance
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log6.content: Analysis of the Spiky medallion reveals a bio-electrical feedback loop. Upon impact, the host's nervous system redirects kinetic energy outward, replicating the defensive adaptations of spiny flora.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log7.title: Log #07: Kinetic Counter-Measure
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log7.content: The Reactive medallion acts as a localized gravity anchor. When struck by force, it discharges kinetic spikes. My tests show it is a mechanical failsafe, protecting the wearer from sudden deceleration.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log8.title: Log #08: Overcharged Synapses
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log8.content: The Damaging medallion forces the host's muscle fibers into a state of continuous contraction. It increases raw offensive output by 150%, but threatens total cellular burnout if sustained.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log9.title: Log #09: Dermal Hardening
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log9.content: Tough medallion data confirms a calcification process. The skin of the wearer crystallizes, absorbing direct kinetic damage. It is an adaptation similar to the iron-skin golems from the deep core.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log10.title: Log #10: Barrier Projection
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log10.content: A sub-spatial energy field manifests around entities holding the Shielded medallion. The shield absorbs high-velocity impacts before recharging from ambient heat.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log11.title: Log #11: Aegis Protocol
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log11.content: Protected medallions generate a temporary stasis field when the host is critically wounded. The wearer enters a phase-locked state, completely immune to temporal damage for a limited window.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log12.title: Log #12: Temporal Acceleration
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log12.content: Speedy medallion hosts experience local time dilation. Their relative velocity increases, allowing them to dodge normal attacks. The strain on their heartbeat is immense.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log13.title: Log #13: Thermal Transduction
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log13.content: Flaming medallions tap into nether-plasma channels. The wearer's physical strikes ignite oxygen molecules, leaving a trail of superheated sulfur.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log14.title: Log #14: Terror Resonance
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log14.content: The Creepy medallion emits low-frequency brainwaves that induce acute paranoia in nearby organic lifeforms. The target's visual cortex experiences hallucinations of incoming threats.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log15.title: Log #15: Probability Manipulation
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log15.content: Lucky medallions shift quantum probabilities in favor of the wearer. Attacks are more likely to bypass defenses, and fatal strikes are statistically mitigated.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log16.title: Log #16: Electrostatic Charge
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log16.content: A static charge accumulates on the skin of the Static host. Movement friction generates voltage, discharging chain lightning to nearby conductors when attacked.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log17.title: Log #17: Elastic Inversion
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log17.content: Bouncy medallions alter the elastic modulus of the host's body. Physical attacks do not pierce; instead, the impact is stored and repelled, launching attackers backward.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log18.title: Log #18: Reflective Duality
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log18.content: Mirror medallions mirror incoming damage vectors. By refracting light and kinetic paths, the attacker feels a portion of their own strike.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log19.title: Log #19: Harmonic Feedback
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log19.content: Resonant medallions vibrate at the frequency of the universe. When struck, they release harmonic waves that disrupt the cell structure of nearby hostile organisms.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log20.title: Log #20: Life Thread Anchor
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log20.content: The Undying medallion acts as a phylactery. If the host suffers fatal damage, it consumes a portion of its internal essence to rebuild the host's physical form.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log21.title: Log #21: Cellular Regeneration
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log21.content: Healthy medallions accelerate mitotic division. Tissue repairs itself in seconds, granting the host double the life span and rapid recovery.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log22.title: Log #22: Silicon Particulates
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log22.content: Sandy medallions generate a shifting shield of abrasive silicon dust. It blinds attackers and dissipates ranged kinetic energy.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log23.title: Log #23: Parasitic Gestation
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log23.content: The Infested medallion carries thousands of microscopic silverfish eggs. Upon the host's death, the eggs hatch instantly, consuming the host's body to fuel their growth.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log24.title: Log #24: Osmotic Dampener
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log24.content: Absorbent medallions act as sponge-like field generators. They absorb incoming status effects and convert them into healing energy for the host.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log25.title: Log #25: Melancholia Wave
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log25.content: The Depressing medallion creates a localized field of deep apathy. Attacking entities lose their fighting spirit, reducing their attack damage and speed.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log26.title: Log #26: Sub-Apathy Field
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log26.content: A lesser version of the Melancholia Wave. It induces a mild state of fatigue and sadness, dampening the aggression of nearby creatures.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log27.title: Log #27: Adaptive Mutagen
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log27.content: Evolving medallions monitor combat data in real-time. The medallion mutates to counter the specific weapon or element used by the attacker.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log28.title: Log #28: Tectonic Disruption
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log28.content: Plow medallions modify the gravitational footprint of the wearer. Their footsteps fracture the ground, destabilizing the footing of any pursuers.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log29.title: Log #29: Hypertrophic Growth
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log29.content: Mega medallions stimulate extreme bone and muscle expansion. The wearer scales up to twice their original size, gaining massive physical power.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log30.title: Log #30: Chaos Unbound
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log30.content: The Mad medallion drives the host into a blind, bloodthirsty frenzy. They attack with reckless abandon, ignoring pain and defense.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log31.title: Log #31: Binary Resonance
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log31.content: Twin medallions bind two souls. If one twin is struck, the other shares the pain but gains matching combat capabilities.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log32.title: Log #32: Enduring Core
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log32.content: Hardy medallions prevent the wearer from being knocked back or staggered. Their mass density matches that of bedrock.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log33.title: Log #33: Viscous Adhesion
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log33.content: Sticky medallions coat the host in a highly viscous substance. Attackers stick to the host, slowing their weapon swings and movements.
enchantment.xeb.rift_siphon.desc: Attacking or defeating a medallion-bearing mob siphons its power, granting Speed, Resistance, or Fire Resistance.
enchantment.xeb.decoherence.desc: Attacks have a 15% chance to disable all active medallion buffs on the target mob for 6 seconds. (3-minute cooldown)
enchantment.xeb.feedback_loop.desc: When blocked or hit, reflects up to 75% of incoming medallion-enhanced damage. Doubled against Spiky/Reflect medallion holders.
enchantment.xeb.resonant_cleave.desc: Striking medallion-bearing mobs triggers a sonic cleave dealing up to 100% damage to nearby mobs. Doubled on matching medallion tiers.
enchantment.xeb.chronostasis.desc: Critical strikes against mobs carrying Speedy or Reactive medallions freeze their movement and attack speed by 80% for 4 seconds.
enchantment.xeb.medallion_overload.desc: Defeating an elite mob carrying medallions triggers a volatile explosion scaled by medallion count and tiers.
enchantment.xeb.floricultural_zeal.desc: Active moveset charge points used by the Golden Flower or Mecha Overdrive have up to a 45% chance to be refunded instantly.
enchantment.xeb.quantum_phase.desc: Grants complete damage and knockback immunity during the active channeling of linear laser beams.
enchantment.xeb.purifying_beam.desc: Laser weapon strikes deal up to 60% bonus damage against negative or parasitic medallion carriers.
enchantment.xeb.aegis_shatter.desc: Weapon strikes bypass 100% of Shattered Rift boss parry/evade mechanics and Protected medallion stasis fields.
xeb.buff.spiky.desc: Reflects 25% to 50% of direct melee damage back to the attacker as kinetic thorn recoil.
xeb.buff.spiky.counter: Use ranged weapons or the Feedback Loop enchantment to reflect the thorn energy back.
xeb.buff.reactive.desc: Gains explosive burst velocity and counter-attacks whenever struck by rapid hits.
xeb.buff.reactive.counter: Use heavy single-hit strikes or apply Chronostasis to freeze rapid reactions.
xeb.buff.damaging.desc: Increases overall attack damage output by +35% to +100% depending on tier.
xeb.buff.damaging.counter: Maintain distance using leap or thrust movesets and block heavy strikes.
xeb.buff.tough.desc: Grants high natural armor density and reduces incoming physical damage by 30%.
xeb.buff.tough.counter: Use armor-bypassing magic, laser beams, or critical strikes.
xeb.buff.shielded.desc: Generates a regenerating absorption shield that absorbs up to 40 bonus health.
xeb.buff.shielded.counter: Break shield layers with heavy burst attacks or Aegis Shatter enchantment.
xeb.buff.protected.desc: Surrounds host in a stasis barrier that negates all front facing physical strikes.
xeb.buff.protected.counter: Flank from behind or use Aegis Shatter enchantment to bypass stasis barriers.
xeb.buff.speedy.desc: Increases movement and attack animation speed by +50% to +100%.
xeb.buff.speedy.counter: Apply Chronostasis or Tarred debuff to freeze their movement speed.
xeb.buff.flaming.desc: Ignites melee attackers and leaves fiery scorch trails on impact.
xeb.buff.flaming.counter: Equip Fire Resistance potions or Rift Siphon enchantment for flame immunity.
xeb.buff.creepy.desc: Emits unsettling whispers that trigger random teleportation wisps near the target.
xeb.buff.creepy.counter: Keep spatial awareness and use area-of-effect cleaves like Resonant Cleave.
xeb.buff.lucky.desc: Has a 25% chance to completely evade incoming attacks and land critical counters.
xeb.buff.lucky.counter: Use area laser beams or multi-hit combos to overcome evasion chance.
xeb.buff.static.desc: Discharges electric arcs when struck, shocking nearby attackers.
xeb.buff.static.counter: Attack with ranged projectiles or use grounding enchantments.
xeb.buff.bouncy.desc: Launches attackers upward on hit and bounces off wall impacts rapidly.
xeb.buff.bouncy.counter: Engage in open terrain and equip Feather Falling armor.
xeb.buff.mirror.desc: Has a 75% chance to reflect incoming arrows and ranged projectiles back at shooter.
xeb.buff.mirror.counter: Switch to direct melee weapons or laser beams which cannot be reflected.
xeb.buff.resonant.desc: Emits sonic shockwaves on hit that deal splash damage to surrounding entities.
xeb.buff.resonant.counter: Isolate the mob from allies and use Resonant Cleave to match sonic frequencies.
xeb.buff.undying.desc: Revives upon death with 50% health and triggers a volatile resurrection blast once.
xeb.buff.undying.counter: Prepare a heavy finisher strike immediately upon resurrection blast.
xeb.buff.healthy.desc: Increases max health pool by +100% to +300% and grants passive health regen.
xeb.buff.healthy.counter: Apply continuous damage-over-time effects like Charring Burn or Madness.
xeb.buff.sandy.desc: Generates a swirling sandstorm cloud that blinds attackers within 4 blocks.
xeb.buff.sandy.counter: Fight from outside the sandstorm radius using long-range weapons.
xeb.buff.infested.desc: Spawns 2 elite parasitic flies upon taking damage or dying.
xeb.buff.infested.counter: Use Purifying Beam or sweeping cleaves to purge swarming flies instantly.
xeb.buff.absorbent.desc: Converts incoming negative status effects into direct health regeneration.
xeb.buff.absorbent.counter: Avoid applying debuffs; rely strictly on raw physical or energy damage.
xeb.buff.depressing.desc: Emits an apathy aura that lowers nearby players' attack damage and movement speed.
xeb.buff.depressing.counter: Equip Rift Siphon or consume golden apples to maintain combat morale.
xeb.buff.slightly_depressing.desc: Emits a weak apathy aura causing minor fatigue to nearby attackers.
xeb.buff.slightly_depressing.counter: Out-damage the minor fatigue penalty with high tier weapons.
xeb.buff.evolving.desc: Mutates resistance against the damage type used by the attacker in combat.
xeb.buff.evolving.counter: Alternate between melee, ranged, and elemental damage sources rapidly.
xeb.buff.plow.desc: Fractures ground footsteps, knocking back and slowing all grounded pursuers.
xeb.buff.plow.counter: Use aerial leaps or levitation to stay off the fractured ground.
xeb.buff.mega.desc: Doubles the host's size and physical reach, granting immense knockback power.
xeb.buff.mega.counter: Keep distance and use high mobility movesets like Spindash or Jet Dash.
xeb.buff.mad.desc: Drives host into a frantic rage, increasing attack speed as HP drops.
xeb.buff.mad.counter: Finish off quickly before HP drops low using Extreme Burst abilities.
xeb.buff.twin.desc: Binds health and stats to nearby mobs, sharing damage mitigation.
xeb.buff.twin.counter: Use area cleaves to eliminate both linked targets simultaneously.
xeb.buff.hardy.desc: Grants absolute knockback immunity and bedrock mass density.
xeb.buff.hardy.counter: Rely on damage output rather than positioning or knockback control.
xeb.buff.sticky.desc: Coats host in viscous tar, slowing weapon swing speed of melee attackers.
xeb.buff.sticky.counter: Use ranged strikes or laser beams to avoid making physical contact.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.title: ENIGMA BIOS v1.0
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.analyzer.empty: No item placed in the analyzer.
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log.locked.title: Log %d [LOCKED]
gui.xeb.enigma_bios.log.locked.desc: This research log requires unlocking by exploring elite relics.
item.xeb.golden_flower.enigma_lore: A strange golden blossom found growing on subterranean soil, whispering promises of friendship and absolute control. It feeds on determination, projecting deceptive petal volleys, tracking flower fields, and weaving sinister spectral illusions in an inescapable dance.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.left_clic: Fires a rapid stream of friendliness pellet projectiles dealing 2.0 damage.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.right_cli: Charges up to 6 homing flower projectiles (8.0 damage each) unleashed in a semicircle.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.active1.d: Summons 5 spectral flower clones that assault targeted hostiles simultaneously.
item.xeb.golden_flower.ability.active2.d: Aerial 3-step combo dash granting Damage Resistance I/III and thrusting forward.
item.xeb.doomfist.enigma_lore: A legendary gauntlet passed down through warlords of conflict, believing that only through strife does humanity evolve. Harnesses kinetic impact charges that smash enemies through structural walls, launching upward strikes that execute massive titans.
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.left_click.des: Short-range kinetic spread firing 4 bullets for 10.0 damage.
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.right_click.de: Devastating charged punch dealing 6.0 to 12.0 damage with heavy knockback.
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active1.name: Rising Uppercut
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active1.desc: Launches user and target skyward (4x damage multiplier against bosses).
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active2.name: Seismic Slam
item.xeb.doomfist.ability.active2.desc: Airborne downward dive impact generating a radial shockwave.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.enigma_lore: An upgraded cybernetic exo-fist engineered for unstoppable frontline dominance. Reinforced with kinetic power-blocking capacitors, high-velocity plasma hand-cannons, and leap-impact shockwaves that fracture the earth and slow all opposing forces.
High-velocity kinetic energy burst dealing 8.0 damage.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.ability.right_click: Empowered kinetic charge dealing 8.0 to 15.0 damage and breaking blocks.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.ability.active1.des: High-leap diagonal arc crashing into the ground with heavy slowness aura.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.ability.active2.des: Defensive posture reducing incoming damage by 80% at the cost of movement speed.
item.xeb.optic_blast.enigma_lore: A Ruby-Quartz Visor designed to contain uncontrollable optic dimension energy from the wearer's gaze. Channeling continuous kinetic laser beams, it emits high-frequency gene-splicing rays and forceful cyclonic airbursts to keep all threats at bay.
Quick optic laser pulse dealing 3.0 damage.
item.xeb.optic_blast.ability.right_click: Continuous frontal laser beam dealing 5.0 damage/tick while consuming visor energy.
item.xeb.optic_blast.ability.active1.des: High-velocity air gust beam repelling all hostiles in front.
item.xeb.optic_blast.ability.active2.des: High-frequency piercing optic beam disintegrating targets.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.enigma_lore: An ancient greatsword forged at the boundary where divine light meets umbral shadow. Wielded by champions of cosmic equilibrium, it manifests impenetrable light barriers, armor-shattering holy thrusts, and balanced dual slashes of judgment.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.ability.left: Arcing melee slash combo dealing 8.0 base melee damage.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.ability.righ: Deploys a divine light barrier absorbing incoming damage for 5 seconds.
item.xeb.holy_duality_blade.ability.acti: Armor-piercing sacred thrust lunging forward dealing 10.0 damage.
Flurry of light and dark slashes dealing 12.0 damage.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.enigma_lore: The overdriven tactical core of a high-speed mechanical ultimate lifeform built to rival legendary speed. Outfitted with high-RPM drill thrusters, continuous Vulcan Gatling cannons, and 3-stage Spindash rockets that lock onto target signatures.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.ability.left_cl: Frontal drill punch thrust dealing 8.0 damage.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.ability.right_c: Continuous Vulcan machine gun fire dealing 2.0 damage per round.
item.xeb.mecha_overdrive.ability.active2: 3-charge spinning Spindash launching homing missiles at locked target.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.enigma_lore: A shattered relic containing the soul of a fierce yet gentle warrior who refuses to let anything stay broken. Manifests a spectral Stand that unleashes 60-punch DORA DORA barrages, high-speed kicks, and the power to fuse hostiles into solid stone.
item.xeb.broken_diamond.ability.left_cli: Direct Stand punch attack or kick finisher following Dora dash.
4-phase Stand dash dragging target for a high-impact kick finisher.
Restoration projectile and stone trap immobilizing target inside rock.
item.xeb.the_tears.enigma_lore: A weeping crystal sphere born from the unceasing tears of a lost child trapped in dark basements. Converts sorrow into explosive spatial teardrops, imbuing projectiles with random elemental affinities and granting total shadowy invisibility.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.left_click.de: Fires a rapid mystic tear projectile dealing 4.0 damage.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.right_click.d: Charges a concentrated tear sphere dealing 8.0 area damage.
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active1.name: Imbue Elemental
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active1.desc: Imbues tears with 1 of 4 elemental affinities (Purple, White, Dark, Cold).
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active2.name: Invisibility Burst
item.xeb.the_tears.ability.active2.desc: Grants invisibility for 20s while unleashing a burst of 6 rapid tears.
item.xeb.moon_tear.enigma_effect: Passive Relic: Grants +20% Mana regen under moonlight and reduces cooldowns by 15%.
item.xeb.tinfoil_hat.enigma_effect: Passive Armor Relic: Grants immunity to Mind Control, Madness aura, and telepathic tracking.
item.xeb.holy_mantle.enigma_effect: Passive Relic: Grants Holy Shield stasis when taking fatal damage once per dimension.
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.enigma_effect: Passive Melee Relic: 20% chance on hit to apply Contusion debuff for 20s.
gui.xeb.tooltip.enigma_bios.quick_access: Quick Access: Press %s (in inventory or Enigma slot)
item.xeb.omega_flowery.extreme_burst.des:
§eTRANSFORMATION EFFECT (INSTANCE):§r
Enters a divine Omega transformation state for 20 seconds.

§aTRANSFORMATION BUFFS:§r
• Zero-Gravity: Suspends gravity and negates fall damage.
• Resistance II & All Stats Up I refreshed every 2s.
• Cooldown Acceleration: Reduces all skill cooldowns by 50%.
• Flower Charge recharge speed increased by 50%.

§cMODIFIED ABILITIES:§r
• Active 2 (Jarona Dash -> Final Jarona): Base damage increased by +100% (2.0x Damage). The first hit attaches a Blue Trail mark; the second hit detonates it dealing +50% bonus explosion damage.
• Active 1 (Flower Dance): Instead of spawning spectral clones, instantly heals 20% of the user's Max HP on activation.
item.xeb.dogma.extreme_burst.desc:
§eFAITH BEAM EFFECT (INSTANT / ACTIVE):§r
Deploys Dogma's Static TV Aura firing a 40-block Brimstone Static Laser for 10 seconds.

§aEFFECTS & DAMAGE:§r
• Continuous Damage: Deals 9.99 Attack Damage per Tick (~200 damage/sec) to all caught enemies.
• Exponential Expansion: Beam width grows from 3 to 10 blocks wide for massive coverage.
• Beam Supremacy: Automatically wins any laser beam clash struggle.
• Recoil Thrust: Recoil force gradually pushes the player backwards during the second half.
item.xeb.quantum_cat_barrage.extreme_bur:
§eFELINE BARRAGE (INSTANT):§r
Fires an instant quantum explosion of feline artillery across a 10-block radius.

§aEFFECTS & DAMAGE:§r
• Cataclysmic Damage: Distributes 100% of all damage dealt by the player over the last 60 seconds (min 2.0 damage per enemy).
• Anti-Heal Debuff: Applies No Health Regen for 10 seconds (200 ticks).
item.xeb.demon_core.enigma_effect: Passive Volatile Relic: Emits deadly Cherenkov radiation bursts to all entities within 8 blocks.
item.xeb.mob_energy.enigma_effect: Passive Relic: Increases maximum Mana capacity by +50 and absorbs slain mob energy.
item.xeb.hot_poker.enigma_effect: Fiery Relic Spear: Deals 7 melee damage, inflicts Charring Burn for 6s, and summons Nether Portal Rifts.
